data.romaji: mondai tsugi no bunshou wo yonde ,
1 ・ 2 ・ 3 ・ 4 kara mottomo yoi mono wo ichi tsu erabi nasai .
data.translation: Choose the best one from 1, 2, 3, and 4.

data.romaji: hagaki mata ha denwa de o negai itashimasu .
data.translation: Please send a postcard or call.

data.romaji: shouhin ha takuhai ( ※ 1 ) bin de o okuri itashimasu no de ,
data.translation: The product will be sent by courier (*1), so

data.romaji: shouhin wo o uketori ni naru toki ni daikin wo o shiharai kudasai .
data.translation: Please pay when you receive the product.

data.romaji: shouhin no nedan ni sorezore no chiiki made no souryou to tesuu ryou ( ※ 2 ) 525 en wo kuwaeta kingaku ni narimasu .
data.translation: The price is the product price plus shipping and handling fees (*2) of 525 yen to each region.

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romaji: o kaiage no shouhin ga goukei de 1 man 5000 en ijou ni naru baai ha ,
data.translation: If the total amount of purchased items is 15,000 yen or more,

data.romaji: souryou to tesuu ryou ha muryou to narimasu .
data.translation: Shipping and handling charges are free.

data.romaji: ( ※ 2 ) tesuu ryou : dare ka no tame ni nani ka wo shita toki ni ,
data.translation: (*2) Fee: When you do something for someone,

data.romaji: sono tema ni taishite harawareru o kin

meaning: indicates the subject of a sentence
indicates the subject of a sentence

data.romajiQues: kono bun no naiyou ni tsuite , tadashii no ha dore ka .
data.translationQues: Which of the following is correct regarding the content of this sentence?
romajiOption: shouhin no chuumon ha , denwa no hoka ni , hagaki ya meeru de mo dekiru .
shouhin no daikin ha , ginkou kara okuruka , yuubin kyoku kara genkin kakitome de okuru .
souryou to tesuu ryou ga muryou ni naru no ha , chuumon ga 1 man 5000 en ijou no toki de aru .
shouhin wo uketoru toki ni shiharau kingaku ha , shouhin no nedan to souryou de aru .
translationOption: You can order products by phone, postcard, or email.
Payment for the product can be sent from a bank or by registered mail from the post office.
Shipping and handling fees are free for orders of 15,000 yen or more.
The amount you pay when you receive the product is the price of the product and shipping charges.
